headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Berkshire Hathaway, Chubb and Progressive
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's diversified businesses, massive cash reserves and insurance float support long-term value, but valuation keeps the outlook balanced.

headline: Strength Seen in Chubb (CB): Can Its 3.2% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: Chubb (CB) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.

headline: Wall Street Firms Bullish on Chubb Limited (CB) as a Top Stock to Buy for Good Returns
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) is one of the best stocks to buy now for good returns. On June 12, Barclays reiterated an Equal Weight rating on Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) and lowered the price target to $368 from $375. The new price target represents significant upside potential as the stock is trading at about $335 a share. […]
